title: Add delta freshness invalidation
goal: Allow old answer declarations to be checked against newer snapshots and classify citation validity/drift without automatic re-dump.

acceptance.assertion: Old citations are classified as valid, drifted, missing or not_comparable.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Checking does not create snapshots or fetch Git state.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Existing freshness statuses remain visible and are not silently normalized.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Tests cover unchanged, moved/drifted, missing and not-comparable cases.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.created_from_plan: RepoBrief Frontdoor and Grounding Verifier v1
metadata.unblocked_by: RBGV-V1-T007 verified via Lenskit PR #937; dependencies RBGV-V1-T002 and RBV1-T006 are verified.
metadata.outcome: Implemented by Lenskit PR #938: read-only answer-grounding delta invalidation helper with valid/drifted/missing/not_comparable classification and freshness status preservation.

verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t008-status: answer_grounding_delta.py classifies valid, drifted, missing and not_comparable; tests cover each status.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t008-no-refresh: mutation_boundary reports no snapshot creation, no Git fetch and no refresh; implementation reads explicit files only.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t008-freshness: test_answer_grounding_delta_preserves_existing_freshness_status keeps old stale and new unknown visible.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t008-tests: test_answer_grounding_delta.py covers unchanged, drifted/hash mismatch, missing citation and not-comparable range-absent cases.

checks: Lenskit PR #938 CI all green before merge
